sections.paragraph:
f. only in plur. מִסְגְּרֹות (from the root סָנַר).

(1) close places, poet. used of fortified cities, Psa 18:46 Mic 7:17.

(2) borders, margins (Randleiften), so called from their inclosing, Exo 25:25, s.q.; 37:14 .

(3) 1Ki 7:28, 29 1Ki 7:29, 31 1Ki 7:31, 32 1Ki 7:32, 35 1Ki 7:35, 36 1Ki 7:36 2Ki 16:17 ornaments on the brasen bases of the basins, which appear to have been square shields, on the four sides of the bases; see verses 28 1Ki 7:28, 29 1Ki 7:29, 31 1Ki 7:31.
